title: Match data queries from all CSV files
evidence: internal/data/loader.go:loadBrasileirao, loadCup, loadLibertadores, loadBRFootball, loadNovo functions + internal/query/engine.go:SearchMatches; TestLoad_AllDatasets passes

title: Player data search
evidence: internal/query/engine.go:SearchPlayers + internal/mcp/tools.go:search_players tool; TestSearchPlayers_FilterAndSort, TestSearchPlayers_ByName pass

title: Basic statistics (wins, losses, goals)
evidence: internal/query/engine.go:TeamStats, CompetitionStats, AverageGoals functions; TestTeamStats_SeasonRecord, TestCompetitionStats_Aggregates pass

title: Handle team name variations
evidence: internal/data/normalize.go:TeamKey, NormalizeTeam functions; TestNormalizeTeam_FoldsVariants with 5 sub-tests (state_suffix, accents, country_qualifier, case, full_name_alias) all pass

title: Return properly formatted responses
evidence: internal/query/format.go contains formatting functions; internal/mcp/tools.go:listMatches, listHeadToHead, listTeamStats, listStandings, listPlayers functions format output

title: All 6 CSV files loadable and queryable
evidence: TestLoad_AllDatasets, TestLoad_FifaPlayerCount verify data/kaggle/(Brasileirao_Matches.csv, Brazilian_Cup_Matches.csv, Libertadores_Matches.csv, BR-Football-Dataset.csv, novo_campeonato_brasileiro.csv, fifa_data.csv) all load successfully

title: Match queries (team, date range, competition, season)
evidence: internal/query/engine.go:SearchMatches with MatchFilter struct supporting Team, Opponent, Venue, Competition, Season, StartDate, EndDate; TestSearchMatches_BetweenTwoTeams, TestSearchMatches_FilterByCompetitionAndSeason, TestSearchMatches_VenueFilter all pass

title: Team queries (history, statistics, comparisons)
evidence: internal/query/engine.go:TeamMatches, TeamStats, Standings; internal/mcp/tools.go:team_stats, head_to_head, standings tools

title: Player queries (name, nationality, club)
evidence: internal/query/engine.go:SearchPlayers supports filtering by Name, Nationality, Club; TestSearchPlayers_FilterAndSort, TestSearchPlayers_ByName pass

title: Competition queries (standings, top scorers, schedules)
evidence: internal/query/engine.go:Standings, CompetitionMatches, CompetitionStats; internal/mcp/tools.go:standings, list_competitions, competition_stats tools

title: Statistical analysis capabilities
evidence: internal/query/engine.go:AverageGoals, TopScorers, CompetitionStats; TestCompetitionStats_Aggregates, TestIntegration_AverageGoalsReasonable pass

title: MCP server protocol implementation
evidence: internal/mcp/protocol.go, internal/mcp/server.go implement JSON-RPC 2.0 MCP spec; TestInitialize_Handshake, TestToolsList_ExposesAllTools, TestToolsCall_* tests pass

title: Cross-file queries (player + match data)
evidence: TestIntegration_BrazilianPlayersExist verifies players can be queried across datasets
